modules.sql: WITH daily_agg AS (SELECT ifw_effective_date, COUNT(*) AS total_transactions, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_amount, MIN(amount) AS min_amount, MAX(amount) AS max_amount FROM transactions GROUP BY ifw_effective_date) SELECT ifw_effective_date, total_transactions, total_amount, avg_amount FROM daily_agg ORDER BY ifw_effective_date
